assets.name: SUSE Brand Design Tokens
assets.description: Canonical SUSE brand tokens (DTCG). The colour picker's swatches and brand-bound input defaults resolve from here. Penpot/Tokens-Studio compatible; generated by scripts/build-brand-tokens.ts.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal Green (on dark)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal White (on dark)
assets.description: White SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal Green (on light)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal Black (on light)
assets.description: Black SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical Green (on dark)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical White (on dark)
assets.description: White SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical Green (on light)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical Black (on light)
assets.description: Black SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: Pulse Rings
assets.description: Concentric SUSE-green rings that scale up and fade out in a staggered pulse. 4s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Loader Dots
assets.description: Three dots — green, pine, green — bouncing in a staggered wave. 3.2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Bar Sweep
assets.description: A rounded SUSE-green bar easing back and forth along a faint pine track — a progress motif. 3.2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Icon Duo Themes
assets.description: Colour pairings for themable two-colour icons (c1 accent / c2 base).

assets.name: Photo Colour Treatments
assets.description: Colour treatments for photo assets: greyscale + soft duotone washes.

assets.name: Mesh · Forest
assets.description: Soft mesh-gradient wash in SUSE greens.

assets.name: Mesh · Tide
assets.description: Cool mesh-gradient wash, midnight to mint.

assets.name: Dot Grid · Mint
assets.description: A fine mint dot grid on deep pine.

assets.name: Flow · Jade
assets.description: Flowing contour lines in jade on a light ground.

assets.name: Contour · Midnight
assets.description: Topographic ring contours on midnight blue.

assets.name: Hatch · Fog
assets.description: A quiet diagonal hatch on soft grey — a calm backdrop for text.

assets.name: Mesh · Dawn
assets.description: Warm mesh-gradient wash — amber and orange over pine.

assets.name: Blueprint Grid
assets.description: Technical minor/major grid on midnight blue.

assets.name: Iso Grid · Pine
assets.description: An isometric rhombus lattice on deep pine.

assets.name: Wave Crest · Mint
assets.description: Layered wave crests rising in mint and jade.

assets.name: Radial Rays · Jade
assets.description: A soft jade sunburst radiating from the corner.

assets.name: Grain · Forest
assets.description: A fine film-grain texture over a pine-to-jade gradient.

assets.name: Spinner Ring
assets.description: A jade arc spinning around a faint mint track — a loading spinner. 2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Wave Equalizer
assets.description: Five jade and mint bars rising and falling in a wave — an audio / activity motif. 2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Pulse Dot
assets.description: A jade dot pulsing with an expanding halo ring — an attention / live motif. 2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Orbit Dot
assets.description: An orange dot orbiting a faint mint ring — a processing / motion motif. 3s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Check Success
assets.description: A jade checkmark drawing itself in over a soft ring — a success / complete motif. 2.5s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Hex Grid · Pine
assets.description: A honeycomb lattice on deep pine.

assets.name: Low Poly · Jade
assets.description: A faceted low-poly mesh shaded across the SUSE greens.

assets.name: Concentric Arcs · Jade
assets.description: Rippling jade arcs radiating from the corner.

assets.name: Circuit · Midnight
assets.description: Right-angle circuit traces and nodes on midnight blue.

assets.name: Halftone Fade · Mint
assets.description: A halftone dot field fading across deep pine.

assets.name: Mesh · Dusk
assets.description: A dusky mesh gradient where warm orange meets cool indigo.

assets.name: Scatter · Confetti
assets.description: Brand-coloured confetti scattered on a light ground — celebratory.

assets.name: Soft Blobs · Mint
assets.description: Overlapping organic blobs in mint and jade on pine.

assets.name: Progress Ring
assets.description: A jade ring that fills and drains around a faint track — a determinate progress motif. 2.5s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Cross Error
assets.description: An orange cross drawing itself in over a soft ring — an error / failed motif. 2.5s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Radar Sweep
assets.description: A jade wedge sweeping around faint rings — a scanning / searching motif. 2.5s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Sparkle
assets.description: Four-point stars twinkling in the brand palette — a celebrate / AI motif. 2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Heartbeat Line
assets.description: A jade ECG trace sweeping across a faint baseline — a live / health motif. 2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Grid · Square
assets.description: A clean thin-lined square grid on light.

assets.name: Bento Containers
assets.description: An outlined bento layout of rounded container blocks.

assets.name: Contour Lines
assets.description: Generative topographic contour lines in fine jade.

assets.name: Contour Flow
assets.description: Fine streamlines tracing a generative flow field.

assets.name: Plus Marks
assets.description: A registration grid of fine plus marks.

assets.name: Radial Grid
assets.description: A polar grid of concentric circles and radial spokes.

assets.name: Graph Paper
assets.description: Engineering graph paper — fine minor and major grid.

assets.name: Triangle Grid
assets.description: A fine equilateral triangle lattice on light.

assets.name: Square Rosette
assets.description: Concentric squares each rotated into a rosette.

assets.name: Box Lattice
assets.description: A network of small square nodes joined by fine lines.

assets.name: Draw Square
assets.description: A rounded square outline drawing itself in — a clean build/loading motif. 2.5s loop.

assets.name: Rotating Squares
assets.description: Three nested square outlines counter-rotating — kinetic geometry. 3s loop.

assets.name: Grid Wave
assets.description: A five-by-five dot grid pulsing in a diagonal wave. 2s loop.

assets.name: Contour Breathe
assets.description: Concentric thin rings gently breathing — a calm contour motif. 3s loop.

assets.name: Line Sweep
assets.description: A bright line sweeping across faint guide columns — a scan motif. 2.5s loop.

assets.name: Hex Draw
assets.description: A hexagon outline drawing itself in. 2.5s loop.

assets.name: Iso Cubes
assets.description: A tessellated field of isometric cubes — tumbling blocks in fine line.

assets.name: Cube Scatter
assets.description: Isometric cube outlines floating at varied depths.

assets.name: Cube Field · Pine
assets.description: Tessellated isometric cubes in mint on deep pine.

assets.name: Cube Draw
assets.description: An isometric cube drawing itself in, face by face. 2.5s loop.
